title: Exemption for Securities under clause (b), (d) and (e) of sub-regulation (1) of regulation 9 of SAST Regulations, 2011
text: These regulations shall not apply to issue of securities under clause (b), (d) and (e) of sub-regulation (1) of regulation 9 of Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

source.span_hint: These regulations shall not apply to issue of securities under clause (b), (d) and (e)

title: Disqualification: issuer/promoters/directors/selling shareholders debarred
text: Not eligible if issuer, any promoter/promoter group/director/selling shareholder is debarred from accessing capital markets by SEBI (unless past debarment has expired).

source.span_hint: if the issuer, any of its promoters

title: Disqualification: promoter/director of another debarred company
text: Not eligible if any promoter/director is promoter/director of another company debarred by SEBI.

source.span_hint: if any of the promoters or directors

title: Disqualification: wilful defaulter or fraudulent borrower
text: Not eligible if issuer/promoters/directors is/are wilful defaulters or fraudulent borrowers.
notes: You already modelled this as is_fraudulent.

source.span_hint: if the issuer or any of its promoters

title: No outstanding convertibles/rights (pre-IPO)
text: Not eligible if there are any outstanding convertibles or rights to receive equity before filing.

source.span_hint: An issuer shall not be eligible to make an initial public offer

title: Net tangible assets ≥ ₹3 cr (pre-IPO)
text: it has net tangible assets of at least three crore rupees, calculated on a restated and consolidated basis, in each of the preceding three full years (of twelve months each), of which not more than fifty per cent. are held in monetary assets.

source.span_hint: it has net tangible assets of at least three crore rupees

title: Operating profit ≥ ₹15 cr (pre-IPO)
text: it has an average operating profit of at least fifteen crore rupees, calculated on a restated and consolidated basis, during the preceding three years (of twelve months each), with operating profit in each of these preceding three years.
notes: Map to operating_profits length=3 and each ≥ 15cr (restated, consolidated).

source.span_hint: it has an average operating profit of at least fifteen crore rupees

title: Net worth ≥ ₹1 cr (pre-IPO)
text: it has a net worth of at least one crore rupees in each of the preceding three full years (of twelve months each), calculated on a restated and consolidated basis.

source.span_hint: it has a net worth of at least one crore rupees

title: Application for in-principle approval to one or more stock exchanges
text: it has made an application to one or more stock exchanges to seek an in-principle approval for listing of its specified securities on such stock exchanges and has chosen one of them as the designated stock exchange, in terms of Schedule XIX;

source.span_hint: it has made an application to one or more stock exchanges

title: Agreement with depository for dematerialisation of securities
text: it has entered into an agreement with a depository for dematerialisation of the specified securities already issued and proposed to be issued;

source.span_hint: it has entered into an agreement with a depository

title: All specified securities held by promoters in dematerialized form
text: all its specified securities held by the promoters are in dematerialised form prior to filing of the offer document.

source.span_hint: all its specified securities held by the promoters are in dematerialised form

title: All existing partly paid-up equity shares fully paid or forfeited
text: all its existing partly paid-up equity shares have either been fully paid-up or have been forfeited.

source.span_hint: all its existing partly paid-up equity shares have either been fully paid-up or have been forfeited

title: Firm arrangements of finance towards 75% of issue proceeds
text: it has made firm arrangements of finance through verifiable means towards seventy five per cent. of the stated means of finance for a specific project proposed to be funded from the issue proceeds, excluding the amount to be raised through the proposed public issue or through existing identifiable internal accruals.

source.span_hint: it has made firm arrangements of finance through verifiable means towards seventy five per cent.

title: Equity shares offered for sale must be held for at least 1 year
text: Only such fully paid-up equity shares may be offered for sale to the public, which have been held by the sellers for a period of at least one year prior to the filing of the draft offer document.

source.span_hint: Only such fully paid-up equity shares may be offered for sale to the public,

title: Equity shares from conversion/exchange of compulsorily convertible securities also subject to holding period
text: Provided that in case the equity shares received on conversion or exchange of fully paid-up compulsorily convertible securities including depository receipts are being offered for sale, the holding period of such convertible securities, including depository receipts, as well as that of resultant equity shares together shall be considered for the purpose of calculation of one year period referred in this sub-regulation.

source.span_hint: Provided that in case the equity shares received on conversion or exchange

title: Holding period of 1 year must be complied at the time of filing draft offer document
text: Provided further that such holding period of one year shall be required to be complied with at the time of filing of the draft offer document.

source.span_hint: Provided further that such holding period of one year shall be required to be complied

title: Exemption for offer for sale of government companies or statutory authorities
text: a) in case of an offer for sale of a government company or statutory authority or corporation or any special purpose vehicle set up and controlled by any one or more of them, which is engaged in the infrastructure sector;

source.span_hint: in case of an offer for sale of a government company or statutory authority

title: Exemption for equity shares acquired under court-approved schemes or government approval
text: b) if the equity shares offered for sale were acquired pursuant to any scheme approved by a High Court *** or approved by a tribunal or the Central Government under the sections 230 to 234 of Companies Act, 2013, as applicable, in lieu of business and invested capital which had been in existence for a period of more than one year prior to approval of such scheme;

source.span_hint: if the equity shares offered for sale were acquired pursuant to any scheme

title: Exemption for equity shares issued under bonus issue on securities held for at least 1 year
text: c) if the equity shares offered for sale were issued under a bonus issue on securities held for a period of at least one year prior to the filing of the draft offer document with the Board and further subject to the following:

source.span_hint: if the equity shares offered for sale were issued under a bonus issue on securities

title: IPO of convertible debt instruments without equity listing
text: An issuer shall be eligible to make an initial public offer of convertible debt instruments even without making a prior public issue of its equity shares and listing thereof. Provided that it is not in default of payment of interest or repayment of principal amount in respect of debt instruments issued by it to the public, if any, for a period of more than six months.

source.span_hint: An issuer shall be eligible to make an initial public offer of convertible debt instruments even

title: Additional requirements for issue of convertible debt instruments
text: In addition to other requirements laid down in these regulations, an issuer making an initial public offer of convertible debt instruments shall also comply with the following conditions: (a) (b) it has obtained credit rating from at least one credit rating agency; it has appointed at least one debenture trustee in accordance with the provisions of the Companies Act, 2013 and the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Debenture Trustees) Regulations, 1993; (c) (d) it shall create a debenture redemption reserve in accordance with the provisions of the Companies Act, 2013 and rules made thereunder; if the issuer proposes to create a charge or security on its assets in respect of secured convertible debt instruments, it shall ensure that:

source.span_hint: In addition to other requirements laid down in these regulations, an issuer making an initial public offer of convertible debt instruments

title: Debenture trustee for IPO of convertible debt instruments
text: it has appointed at least one debenture trustee in accordance with the provisions of the Companies Act, 2013 and the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Debenture Trustees) Regulations, 1993.

source.span_hint: it has appointed at least one debenture trustee in accordance with the provisions

title: Tenure of warrants ≤ 18 months
text: The tenure of such warrants shall not exceed eighteen months from the date of their allotment.

source.span_hint: The tenure of such warrants shall not exceed

title: Upfront determination of exercise price
text: c)  the price or formula for determination of exercise price of the warrants shall be determined upfront and disclosed in the offer document and at least twenty-five per cent. of the consideration amount based on the exercise price shall also be received upfront;

source.span_hint: c)  the price or formula for determination of exercise

title: Minimum promoters’ contribution ≥ 20%
text: The promoters of the issuer shall hold at least twenty per cent. of the post-issue capital.

source.span_hint: The promoters of the issuer shall hold at least

title: Warrant consideration forfeiture
text: in case the warrant holder does not exercise the option to take equity shares against any of the warrants held by the warrant holder, within three months from the date of payment of consideration, such consideration made in respect of such warrants shall be forfeited by the issuer.

source.span_hint: in case the warrant holder does not exercise

title: Ineligible securities: non-cash acquisition or revaluation/capitalization
text: Specified securities acquired during the preceding three years, if these are acquired for consideration other than cash and revaluation of assets or capitalisation of intangible assets is involved in such transaction.

source.span_hint: acquired for consideration other than cash

title: Ineligible securities: bonus issue against ineligible shares
text: Specified securities resulting from a bonus issue by utilisation of revaluation reserves or unrealised profits of the issuer or from bonus issue against equity shares which are ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution.

source.span_hint: resulting from a bonus issue

title: Ineligible securities: acquisition by certain entities at lower price
text: Specified securities acquired by the promoters and alternative investment funds or foreign venture capital investors or scheduled commercial banks or public financial institutions or insurance companies registered with Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India, during the preceding one year at a price lower than the price at which specified securities are being offered to the public in the initial public offer.

source.span_hint: acquired by the promoters

title: Specified securities ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution (preceding three years, consideration other than cash)
text: specified securities acquired during the preceding three years, if these are: acquired for consideration other than cash and revaluation of assets or capitalisation of intangible assets is involved in such transaction;

source.span_hint: specified securities acquired during the preceding three years

title: Specified securities ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution (preceding three years, bonus issue)
text: resulting from a bonus issue by utilisation of revaluation reserves or unrealised profits of the issuer or from bonus issue against equity shares which are ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution;

source.span_hint: resulting from a bonus issue by utilisation of revaluation reserves

title: Lock-in of specified securities held by promoters (minimum contribution)
text: The specified securities held by the promoters shall be locked-in for a period of eighteen months from the date of allotment in the initial public offer.

source.span_hint: The specified securities held by the promoters shall not be transferable

title: Lock-in of specified securities held by promoters (excess contribution)
text: Promoters’ holding in excess of minimum promoters’ contribution shall be locked-in for a period of six months from the date of allotment in the initial public offer.

source.span_hint: promoters’ holding in excess of minimum promoters’ contribution

title: Lock-in of specified securities held by persons other than promoters
text: The entire pre-issue capital held by persons other than the promoters shall be locked-in for a period of 6 months from the date of allotment in the initial public offer.
notes: Map to lock_in_period (6 months) and lock_in_holders (persons other than promoters).

source.span_hint: The entire pre-issue capital held by persons other than the promoters shall be locked-in

title: Lock-in of convertible securities and resultant equity shares
text: For the purpose of clause (c), in case such equity shares have resulted pursuant to conversion of fully paid-up compulsorily convertible securities, the holding period of such convertible securities as well as that of resultant equity shares together shall be considered for the purpose of calculation of 6 months period and convertible securities shall be deemed to be fully paid-up, if the entire consideration payable thereon has been paid and no further consideration is payable at the time of their conversion.
notes: Map to lock_in_convertible_securities (if applicable) and lock_in_resultant_equity_shares (if applicable).

source.span_hint: For the purpose of clause (c), in case such equity shares have resulted

title: Lock-in of bonus equity shares
text: For the purpose of clause (c), in case such equity shares have resulted pursuant to a bonus issue, then the holding period of such equity shares against which the bonus issue is made as well as holding period of resultant bonus equity shares together shall be considered for the purpose of calculation of 6 months period, subject to the following:
notes: Map to lock_in_bonus_equity_shares (if applicable) and conditions (a and b).

source.span_hint: For the purpose of clause (c), in case such equity shares have resulted

title: Lock-in of specified securities
text: Specified securities locked-in for the remaining period from the date on which they are returned to the lender. Lock-in of party-paid securities ends only on the expiry of three years after such specified securities have become pari passu with the specified securities issued to the public.
notes: Map to lock_in_period, return_date, pari_passu_date (if applicable).

source.span_hint: Specified securities locked-in for the remaining period

title: Appointment of lead manager(s)
text: Issuer shall appoint one or more merchant bankers, which are registered with the Board, as lead manager(s) to the issue.

source.span_hint: Issuer shall appoint one or more merchant bankers

title: Appointment of lead manager(s)
text: The issuer shall appoint one or more merchant bankers, which are registered with the Board, as lead manager(s) to the issue.

source.span_hint: The issuer shall appoint one or more merchant bankers

title: Rights, obligations and responsibilities of lead managers
text: Where the issue is managed by more than one lead manager, the rights, obligations, and responsibilities, relating inter alia to disclosures, allotment, refund, and underwriting obligations, if any, of each lead manager shall be predetermined and be disclosed in the draft offer document and the offer document as specified in Schedule I.

source.span_hint: Where the issue is managed by more than one lead manager
